completed_tasks.name: Add entry-flow regression coverage and the Phase 1 browser scaffold
Implement last-active resume, lightweight document context, and inline empty-canvas creation
completed_tasks.progress: Added last-active document session persistence, draft-document registration, lightweight header/sidebar/tab copy, new-document entry flow, E2E scaffolding, GraphCanvas no-op guards for repeated selection/snapshot writes, and callback stability fixes. Unit tests pass, but Playwright still fails with Maximum update depth exceeded at GraphCanvas ReactFlow mount.

remaining_tasks.name: Finish GraphCanvas loop fix, pass 01-01 browser verification, commit Task 2, write 01-01-SUMMARY.md, then continue wave 2

blockers.description: E2E remains blocked by a runtime loop: Maximum update depth exceeded at GraphCanvas ReactFlow mount during both resume and new-document entry scenarios.
blockers.workaround: No reliable workaround yet. Candidate fixes already tried: idempotent selection updates, idempotent tab snapshot writes, removing ReactFlow fitView prop, stabilizing toolbar callbacks, and stabilizing showToast.

blockers.description: .planning/phases/01-canvas-core-authoring/01-RESEARCH.md still matches placeholder/TBD grep and should be treated as incomplete planning collateral.
blockers.workaround: Do not treat 01-RESEARCH as finished without a separate cleanup pass.

decisions.decision: Keep WorkspaceClient and the existing graph tab model as the only entry seam.
decisions.rationale: The phase plan explicitly avoids a second shell or setup-first onboarding flow.

decisions.decision: Persist last-active document state by workspace session key derived from workspace name plus file list.
decisions.rationale: Resume behavior should remain tied to the current workspace source without adding new transport or storage systems.

decisions.decision: Represent new untitled documents as draft documents in graph store/file tree state and open them directly into an empty canvas.
decisions.rationale: Phase 1 requires empty-canvas-first creation without a naming modal or server-side file creation flow.

decisions.decision: Do not commit Task 2 until browser verification passes.
decisions.rationale: Repeated test runs were deliberate verification passes after each candidate fix so the phase would not record a false completion.

next_action: Resume by instrumenting GraphCanvas mount/update paths to identify the remaining loop source, starting with ReactFlow mount callbacks and overlay/viewport effects that still mutate state during entry boot. Re-run bun run test:e2e --grep "canvas core authoring entry" only after the next concrete fix.
context_notes: Current execution target is .planning/phases/01-canvas-core-authoring/01-01-PLAN.md Task 2. Task 1 is already committed as 2bab6f4. The browser is still crashing before the entry assertions can see the tab or New document button. The strongest remaining suspicion is a GraphCanvas mount/update loop that was not eliminated by the first round of idempotency and callback-stability fixes. There are unrelated dirty planning/docs files in the worktree; do not revert them.
